tasks.name: Launch workspace shell
tasks.entry_state: User opens web/tauri app and no transport connection exists
tasks.exit_state: Workspace shell is visible with scoped project and transport status
happy_path: Hydrate project list and last session
Render default canvas and status indicators
failure_modes: Daemon unavailable -> show setup and retry flow
Protocol mismatch -> show compatibility error and safe read-only mode
No projects -> open guided project bootstrap

tasks.name: Switch project scope
tasks.entry_state: Workspace shell is loaded with at least one project
tasks.exit_state: All panels, canvases, and context rails are scoped to selected project
happy_path: Select project from sidebar or command palette
Hydrate selected project entities and tabs
failure_modes: Unsaved state -> explicit confirm checkpoint
Project hydration fail -> degraded mode with retry
Scope leakage -> force scoped store reset

tasks.name: Run conversation turn
tasks.entry_state: Connected workspace with active conversation session
tasks.exit_state: Turn emits streamed events and renderable GenUI DSL patches
happy_path: User submits text or voice prompt
failure_modes: Stream interrupted -> replay/resume control
Malformed patch -> schema error + rollback
Adapter render error -> fallback renderer and diagnostics

tasks.name: Complete voice duplex cycle
tasks.entry_state: Voice mode enabled and provider configured
tasks.exit_state: User can speak/listen in duplex mode with transcript and interruption support
happy_path: Render response events and UI patches
Play TTS output with barge-in enabled
failure_modes: No local provider -> install/config flow
Latency spike -> degrade to text-first mode
Low confidence -> confirmation prompt before privileged actions

tasks.name: Review privileged execution
tasks.entry_state: Conversation emits execution intent requiring policy gate
tasks.exit_state: Action is approved/denied with full policy and audit trace
happy_path: Approve or deny with recorded rationale
failure_modes: Policy deny -> surface alternatives
Lease expired -> re-auth / renewal flow
Worker dispatch failure -> rollback and retry controls

tasks.name: Monitor control-plane status
tasks.entry_state: Workspace connected and background services running
tasks.exit_state: Operator sees daemon/poly/index health with clear degradation indicators
happy_path: Aggregate daemon, polyglot, and index metrics
failure_modes: Partial telemetry -> mark unknown and retain last-good values
Monitoring stream stale -> reconnect and show stale timestamp
Conflicting statuses -> require explicit source selection

tasks.name: Diagnose and repair service failures
tasks.entry_state: Any service enters degraded or failed state
tasks.exit_state: Service returns to healthy or incident is escalated with context
failure_modes: Repair action unavailable -> show manual instructions
Repair fails -> escalate with captured diagnostics
Repeated failure -> quarantine service and alert

tasks.name: Inspect and edit config safely
tasks.exit_state: Resolved config and provenance are visible; updates respect scope policies
failure_modes: Unauthorized scope write -> block and explain
Invalid key/schema -> fail-fast with validator output
Conflict resolution failure -> preserve old state and show diff

tasks.name: Track validation gate outcomes
tasks.entry_state: Execution/release workflow reaches quality gate checkpoints
tasks.exit_state: Gate status is visible with pass/fail evidence and remediation
happy_path: Collect quality gate and architecture pass results
Block risky execution when mandatory gates fail
failure_modes: Validator timeout -> mark inconclusive and require retry
Missing evidence -> mark gate as fail
Conflicting gate results -> require manual adjudication

tasks.name: Manage worker waves
tasks.entry_state: Remote workers are requested for multi-task execution
tasks.exit_state: Worker waves are dispatched, monitored, and recoverable
failure_modes: Worker crash -> auto-retry or reassign
Approval timeout -> pause wave and notify
Policy violation -> cancel affected workers

tasks.name: Switch renderer adapter
tasks.entry_state: Current scene is active under one renderer adapter
tasks.exit_state: Scene is re-rendered under selected adapter with parity checks
happy_path: Run visual and schema parity checks
failure_modes: Capability mismatch -> show unsupported features
Theme token mismatch -> fail-fast and block switch
Parity drift -> open side-by-side diff

tasks.name: Inspect index and search stack
tasks.exit_state: Search is executed with backend visibility and health context
happy_path: Show index freshness and source provenance
failure_modes: Backend unavailable -> fallback with warning
Stale index -> trigger refresh workflow
Source mismatch -> flag provenance conflict
